title: Bihar Board 10th, 12th Compartment Result 2026

detail.title: Bihar Board 10th, 12th Compartment Result 2026
detail.short_info: Bihar Board Result 2026 released for Class 10 and Class 12 Compartment exams on the official website - biharboardonline.org on 23-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Bihar Board result.

content.text: Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) has officially released the Bihar Board 10th, 12th Compartment Result 2026 for students who appeared in the supplementary examinations. The results are now available for both Class 10 (Matric) and Class 12 (Intermediate) students across various streams including Arts, Science, and Commerce.

Bihar Board Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://www.biharboardonline.org/. Students can check and download their results by entering their roll number and roll code through the login portal.
Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the scorecard. In case of any discrepancy, they should immediately contact the Bihar Board authorities for correction.

Bihar Board has released the Class 10 and Class 12 compartment results for the 2026 academic session on its official website. Students can access their results online using their login credentials and download them for future reference.

Bihar Board has activated the direct link to check Class 10 and Class 12 compartment results 2026. Students can now easily view and download their results through the official portal using the links provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check Bihar Board Compartment Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check your Bihar Board Class 10 or 12 compartment result online:

items: Click on the link for “Bihar Board 10th or 12th Compartment Result 2026”
Enter your Roll Code and Roll Number in the login fields
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference

seo_tags: Bihar Board compartment result date and time
